channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's 'Swiss Army' tools on Iran: Vance and Rubio
item.description: As President Trump seeks a peace deal with Iran, he has a dovish adviser in Vice President Vance on one shoulder and a hawkish one in Rubio on the other.

item.title: Historical caution from the AI boom
item.description: Data: BIS ; Chart: Danielle Alberti/Axios The current AI expansion mirrors past tech booms that often ended in economic downturns.

item.title: Trump's Supreme Court victories face economic limits
item.description: The Supreme Court granted President Trump unprecedented executive power this term, but blocked his administration on economic issues.

item.title: House vote sets up Senate clash over kids' online safety
item.description: The House passed the KIDS Act on Monday, but key senators say the bill faces slim chances of advancing in its current form.
